description: CompositionPink T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron If the techie is your little one is working full swing, then this tantra t-shirt is a perfect way to show how dumb your little one thinks the adults are. Team this cotton t-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and watch him wink at his devilish belief in style.
